mapper.select: SELECT p.id as post_id, p.user_id, p.title, p.content, p.content_format, p.word_count, p.type, p.status, p.is_top, p.like_count, p.comment_count, p.view_count, p.images, p.create_time, p.update_time, u.nick_name, u.avatar FROM post p LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.id = #{postId} AND p.is_deleted = 0 AND p.status = 1

SELECT p.id as post_id, p.user_id, p.title, p.content, p.content_format, p.word_count, p.type, p.status, p.is_top, p.like_count, p.comment_count, p.view_count, p.images, p.create_time, p.update_time, u.nick_name, u.avatar FROM post p LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id
p.is_deleted = 0 AND p.status = 1
AND p.type = #{type}
AND (p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY
p.view_count DESC p.like_count DESC p.create_time DESC p.create_time DESC
LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post
is_deleted = 0 AND status = 1
AND type = #{type}
AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
mapper.update: UPDATE post SET comment_count = comment_count + 1, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{postId}
UPDATE post SET comment_count = GREATEST(comment_count - 1, 0), update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{postId}
mapper.select: SELECT p.id as post_id, p.user_id, p.title, p.content, p.content_format, p.word_count, p.type, p.status, p.is_top, p.like_count, p.comment_count, p.view_count, p.images, p.create_time, p.update_time, u.nick_name, u.avatar FROM post p LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} AND p.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY p.create_time DESC

SELECT -- 帖子统计 (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0) AS total_posts, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 AND status = 1) AS published_posts, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 AND status = 0) AS draft_posts, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 AND status = 3) AS reviewing_posts, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 AND status = 2) AS locked_posts, -- 互动统计 COALESCE((SELECT SUM(comment_count) FROM post WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0), 0) AS total_comments, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(like_count) FROM post WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0), 0) AS total_likes, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(view_count) FROM post WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0), 0) AS total_views, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(word_count) FROM post WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0), 0) AS total_words, -- 粉丝统计 (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_follow WHERE followee_id = #{userId}) AS total_followers, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_follow WHERE followee_id = #{userId} AND DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()) AS new_followers, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT uf.follower_id) FROM user_follow uf INNER JOIN post p ON uf.follower_id = p.user_id WHERE uf.followee_id = #{userId} AND (p.comment_count > 0 OR p.like_count > 0)) AS interactive_followers

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
AND status = 0
AND status != 0
AND status = #{status}

SELECT p.id as post_id, p.user_id, p.title, p.content, p.content_format, p.word_count, p.type, p.status, p.is_top, p.like_count, p.comment_count, p.view_count, p.images, p.create_time, p.update_time, u.nick_name, u.avatar FROM post p LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.id = #{postId} AND p.is_deleted = 0 AND p.user_id = #{userId}
